name: Hungarian Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the softened cream cheese and butter until well combined.
2. Add the sour cream, crumbled feta cheese, mustard, chopped green onions, Hungarian paprika, caraway seeds, and salt to the mixture.
3. Stir all ingredients together until smooth and well incorporated.
4. Shape the mixture into a smooth mound on a serving plate.
5. Garnish with capers if desired.
Hungarian Cheese Spread
